name: memodev
description: MemoDev is a full-stack developer knowledge vault designed to help programmers store, organize, and revisit implementation logic, documentation, and reusable code snippets across projects.

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @memodev/server & npm run dev -w @memodev/client
scripts.build: npm run build -w @memodev/server && npm run build -w @memodev/client
